shortDescription.default: Quick access to SharePoint sites via search, favorites, and navigation

longDescription.default: Helvety SPO Explorer provides a navigation panel for SharePoint Online. Features include site search, favorites management, quick site access, and customizable settings. It appears in the top placeholder as a navigation bar with a Sites button and favorites menu.

features.title: Application Extension - Deployment of custom action
features.description: Deploys a custom action with ClientSideComponentId association
